name: Beck's Oil (Geneseo)
description: Independent fuel/travel stop at I-80 Exit 19 in Geneseo offering diesel, a convenience store and deli, and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #766
description: 24-hour Love's travel center at I-80 Exit 27 with roughly 137 truck spaces, 7 showers, Subway/Chester's/Godfather's, truck service bays, laundry and a CAT Scale.

name: Atkinson Plaza (Shell)
description: Independent Shell-branded truck plaza at I-80 Exit 27 offering fuel, food, restrooms, showers and truck parking.

name: Road Ranger Travel Center #541
description: Large Road Ranger travel center at I-80 Exit 56 with about 250 truck spaces, showers, laundry, an on-site Boss Truck Shop with tire/repair service, and a CAT Scale.

name: Sapp Bros Travel Center - Peru
description: 24-hour Sapp Bros travel center at I-80 Exit 73 with Burger King, showers, laundry, and a full heavy-duty truck and tire service center.

name: Flying J Travel Center #644
description: Flying J travel plaza at I-80 Exit 77 with roughly 186 truck spaces, 15 showers, a 24/7 Denny's, laundry and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #351
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at I-80 Exit 81 with showers, laundry, Subway and McDonald's, and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale (Geneseo / Beck's Oil)
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Beck's Oil truck stop off I-80 Exit 19.

name: CAT Scale (Atkinson / Love's #766)
description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #766 off I-80 Exit 27.

name: CAT Scale (Princeton / Road Ranger)
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Road Ranger travel center off I-80 Exit 56.

name: CAT Scale (La Salle / Flying J #644)
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J travel center off I-80 Exit 77.

name: CAT Scale (Utica / Love's #351)
description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #351 off I-80 Exit 81.

name: Diamond Truck Wash
description: Truck and trailer wash on May Road near I-80 Exit 73 in Peru.

name: Princeton Tire Service
description: Tire dealer and medium/heavy-duty repair shop near I-80 Exit 56 offering 24-hour emergency road service.

name: Mississippi Rapids Rest Area (Welcome Center)
description: Illinois welcome center and rest area on I-80 eastbound near mile marker 1 (about 1 mile east of the Iowa line) with truck and car parking and restrooms.

name: Great Sauk Trail Rest Area
description: 24-hour Illinois rest area on both directions of I-80 near mile marker 51 (west of Princeton) with lighted, paved truck and car parking and restrooms.

name: I-80 Weigh Station (Quad Cities)
description: State truck weigh/inspection scales on I-80 in the East Moline/Quad Cities area near the Iowa line (eastbound and westbound facilities).
